title: The Last Performance
setting: An empty concert hall backstage dressing room. Warm tungsten mirror bulbs and velvet curtains.
narrative_introduction: The lens opens backstage after the final curtain. A violinist's dressing room. Rosin dust floating in the mirror lights. Observe the silent intention behind the performance.

mechanics.observation: Locked-off 2-second cinematic moment. A solo violinist sets her bow inside the velvet case, touches a folded telegram beside the mirror, and gently closes the latch.
mechanics.memory: Spatial fragment placement. Reconstruct the dressing room: violin bow, velvet case, folded telegram, rosin cake, mirror bulb reflections, sheet music score.
mechanics.discovery: Frozen moment exploration. Attuning to the telegram and violin bow reveals the emotional truth behind her final note.
mechanics.evidence: Archive entry reveals the violinist played the encore not for the auditorium audience, but for the name signed on the telegram.
mechanics.reflection: Iris voice synthesizes the emotional resonance of the note. Archive entry: 'The Last Performance'.

environment.location: concert hall backstage dressing room, vanity table

lighting.key_detail: fine golden rosin dust suspended around the violin strings

camera.depth_of_field: shallow, violin bow and telegram sharp
camera.color_grade: warm theatrical amber, rich crimson velvet, golden brass highlights

animation.violinist: lowers bow into case (0.8s) -> touches telegram (0.7s) -> closes latch (0.5s) = 2.0s
animation.rosin_dust: cloud of amber rosin dust settling slowly onto the velvet
animation.mirror_bulb: slight voltage flicker on the third mirror bulb

ambient_details: Stradivarius pattern violin resting on crimson velvet
wooden bow with horsehair slightly frayed near the frog
folded yellow Western Union telegram with embossed seal
cake of amber rosin with deep thumb grooves
open manuscript of Bach's Chaconne with circled final measure

audio.base_layer: distant concert hall applause fading, wooden floorboard resonance
audio.focus_layer: horsehair brushing velvet, paper rustle of telegram, brass case latch click
audio.transition: pure violin E-string harmonic fading into silence

subtle: frayed horsehair on bow shows intense final crescendo
telegram has a single teardrop smudge
deep: final measure of Bach manuscript is marked 'Adagio per Elena'
intentionally_missed_first_view: mirror reflection shows her serene, triumphant smile

reconstruction.iris_prompt: Reconstruct the dressing room. Place the objects of intention.

attunements.reveals: telegram text: 'Arrived safely. I heard every note from across the sea. — Elena'
frayed horsehair at the frog indicates an impassioned, unrepeated cadenza
penciled dedication over the final chord: 'For Elena, who taught me how to listen.'

investigation.iris_intervention: You have witnessed her dedication. The music ended, but the intention remains held in light.

revelation.iris_response: You noticed the frayed bow hair. You noticed the telegram beside the vanity mirror. You noticed the dedication on the final chord. She did not play for applause; she played across the distance to the one who truly listened.

archive_mapping.title: The Last Performance
archive_mapping.iris_note: When the bow settled into the velvet, the final note was already safely across the sea.
